name: ModMe Observability & Telemetry Collection
description: Parallel-agent skill bundle for observability pipeline hardening — telemetry-cli, bridge dual-write, Session Ops UI, data-quality audit, and DSP subgraph orientation. Global-only skills (parallel-agents, distributed-debugging-debug-trace, observability-engineer, context7-auto-research): npx skills add <owner/repo@skill> --agent cursor -y. Project skill: .cursor/skills/observability-pipeline/SKILL.md (not vendor-installable).

items.usage: Map observability subgraph entrypoints before edits; evidence-only codebase discovery
Diagnose telemetry-bridge, pipeline_runs, and sync failures
Schema evolution for 009_observability_tenant.sql and Prisma alignment
RLS, indexes, and Postgres review for observability tables
Spec-traced verification for telemetry:test and telemetry:audit gates
Three-layer review of contract snapshots and audit findings
Trace boundaries, span export, and OTel/Greptime debugging
Instrumentation patterns for session-logger and agenttrace hooks
Regenerate AGENTS.md when observability commands or contracts change
HTML report artefacts for telemetry:report and eval synthesis
Distributed trace analysis when sync or span export fails
Eval signal tracing and LLM observability debugging
Secrets redaction review in telemetry payloads and session logs
Merge observability runbook discoveries into agent instructions
